questions.question: What is the output of the command `echo -n 'Hello World' | od -A n -t u1 -v`?
questions.hint: This command is used to display the hexadecimal representation of a string.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the `date` command and what is its general syntax?
questions.hint: This command is used to display the current date and time. Provide the general syntax of this command.

questions.question: Write a Unix command to show only the files modified in the last 2 days in the current directory, and explain the options used.
questions.hint: Use the `ls` command and provide the options used in your answer.
